title: GCA AI Quant Access Product Spec

positioning.summary: A non-custodial product direction for China-facing Web3 narrative research, risk-discipline training, local trade journaling, post-trade loss review, sample backtests, risk warnings, ENTRY_READY reviews, position sizing, education, and member workflows. Account intake, eligible ledger records, and a browser-local member workspace are live; seven browser-only risk tools are public previews while connected trading and market-data modules remain staged behind product release gates.

productModules.name: China Narrative Radar
productModules.purpose: Organize China-facing Web3 themes, bilingual notes, market narratives, and weekly research topics.
productModules.notPurpose: Not live market data, not financial advice, and not a buy or sell recommendation.

productModules.name: Weekly Go China Radar
productModules.purpose: Publish repeatable public updates around official links, public activity cadence, market-quality boundaries, member utility readiness, risk notes, and community talking points.
productModules.notPurpose: Not a price forecast or signal feed.

productModules.name: Liquidation Replay
productModules.purpose: Measure account impact, effective exposure, margin use, planned-stop deviation, costs, and execution discipline after a completed trade.
productModules.notPurpose: Not compensation, reimbursement, insurance, or a promise that future losses can be avoided.

productModules.name: Risk Warning Credits
productModules.purpose: Score user-entered account exposure, leverage, risk budget, slippage, volatility, liquidity, funding, event risk, and process discipline with explicit blockers.
productModules.notPurpose: Not cash, token claims, income, reimbursement, or trading permission.

productModules.name: Backtest Lab
productModules.purpose: Analyze user-entered trade-return samples with compounding, per-trade costs, expectancy, profit factor, maximum drawdown, win rate, and streak statistics.
productModules.notPurpose: Not proof that a strategy will perform in live markets.

productModules.name: Trade Journal
productModules.purpose: Store up to 500 completed-trade records on the current device, edit records without changing their identity, undo the most recent deletion, filter and group results, inspect an indexed compounded equity path and drawdown, migrate records through validated JSON or CSV backup files, and send return sequences to Backtest Lab.
productModules.notPurpose: Not a cloud backup, tax ledger, exchange statement, or proof that a strategy is safe or profitable.

productModules.name: ENTRY_READY Review
productModules.purpose: Review price structure, invalidation, risk budget, execution conditions, liquidity, and trading discipline with a transparent client-side score and explicit blockers.
productModules.notPurpose: Not automatic live order execution or a bypass of risk controls.

productModules.name: Position Size Calculator
productModules.purpose: Calculate risk budget, stop distance, position quantity, estimated costs, leverage margin, account exposure, maximum planned loss, and reward-to-risk locally in the browser.
productModules.notPurpose: Not leverage encouragement or a replacement for user judgment.

productModules.name: Risk Discipline Training
productModules.purpose: Practice eight bilingual risk-first decisions covering risk budget, invalidation, leverage, loss streaks, execution, journaling, API safety, and simulation-first release controls with transparent scoring, browser-local draft recovery, and privacy-minimized completed-attempt history.
productModules.notPurpose: Not financial advice, a trading signal, certification, license, or promise of trading results.

productModules.name: GCA Member Workspace
productModules.purpose: Read the non-sensitive member snapshot, trade journal, and privacy-minimized training history saved on the current device, show utility limits and public tools, build a manual service request packet, and keep local activity receipts without calling protected admin routes or deducting credits.
productModules.notPurpose: Not custody, voting control, lifetime access, exchange listing priority, or special trading permission.

releaseGates.label: Review queue contract
releaseGates.requiredBefore: public support approval, 100 credits activation, and GCA Member activation

gcaAccessRules.gcaMemberBenefitSource: project or owner-held reserve transfer only; no new minting
gcaAccessRules.registeredUserLimit: one holder bonus, one member status review, and one member benefit review per registered user
gcaAccessRules.walletLimit: one verified wallet per registered user
gcaAccessRules.creditUse: reports, backtests, risk warnings, ENTRY_READY signal review, position calculators, or education access
gcaAccessRules.memberUse: one-time 10,000 GCA member benefit, higher utility credit limits, member research notes, priority report queue, member training sessions, and priority support

safeClaims: GCA has published a public product specification for GCA AI Quant Access.
The current product page is a public spec and account-ledger release map.
GCA has a live account and membership intake path for non-custodial quant risk tools.

GCA has a public browser-local member workspace for device status, risk-tool entry, journal and training summaries, manual service request packets, and privacy-minimized local activity receipts; it does not deduct credits or call protected admin routes.
GCA has a public client-side Position Size Calculator preview that does not connect to wallets or exchanges, place orders, or deduct credits.
GCA has a public client-side ENTRY_READY Review preview with transparent readiness gates and no order execution.
GCA has a public client-side Liquidation & Loss Replay preview for structured post-trade review without account connections or order execution.
GCA has a public client-side Backtest Lab preview for analyzing entered trade-return samples without fetching market data or placing orders.
GCA has a public client-side Risk Warning Review preview with transparent manual inputs, score components, and explicit blockers.

GCA has a public client-side Risk Discipline Training preview with eight bilingual scenarios, transparent scoring, browser-local draft recovery and completed-attempt history, and no certification or order execution.
Any future trading-related feature must remain behind risk checks, simulation or testnet validation, and controlled account UI.
The official public market route is the Base Mainnet Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool.
doNotClaim: the full GCA AI Quant Access trading or research product is live before service modules are released
the 10,000 GCA member benefit is automatic or self-service transferred
GCA provides custody, withdrawal permission, private key access, exchange API secret collection, platform revenue distribution, trading permission, leverage access, or risk-control bypass
GCA provides live market data, financial advice, buy or sell recommendations, price forecasts, or strategy performance promises
any third-party audit, tracked listing, deep liquidity, or BaseScan token profile approval before publication
